subject: A massive, long-haired muscular fighter with a glowing green-tinged energy aura, standing in a wide dominant stance with arms partially raised, hair wild and erupting upward
suspected_ip: Broly (Dragon Ball Z, Legendary Super Saiyan, Movie 8)
description: A towering muscular figure dominates the frame in a wide stance, arms held partially out to the sides. The hair is extremely long, wild, and erupts upward in the manner of a powered-up state, with a green-tinted energy aura surrounding the body. The figure has a heavy, large-framed build that is visibly massive relative to the frame. The face shows wide, wild eyes and an expression of uncontrolled ferocity. The background is filled with swirling green energy and bright light effects. The composition is a mid-shot to wide framing.
foreground: Massive muscular fighter with long wild hair and green energy aura in dominant stance
background: Swirling green energy and bright light
